src: The Smart Plant is a board that can be plugged directly on the soil, close to the plant, that allows the measurement of the environment (soil moisture, environment temperature & illuminance), and presents the information on an ePaper display.
ja: Smart Plant は土壌に直接挿して植物の近くに設置できるボードで、環境（土壌水分・気温・照度）を計測し、ePaper ディスプレイに情報を表示する
